dc_description: A rural two-lane paved road curves through dry, golden hills under a blue sky with scattered clouds. The viewpoint appears to be from a motorcycle or scooter, with blurred handlebars and a mirror visible in the foreground. On the right shoulder, several road signs are posted, including triangular warning signs and circular speed/limit signs. Dry grass, shrubs, and a few trees line the roadside.
novel_visual_observations: Two triangular warning signs on the right each have an added panel reading “3 km.” The landscape is predominantly arid, with yellow-brown grass covering the hills and only sparse green vegetation near the road.
location_name: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Siena
rich_context: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Unione dei Comuni Amiata Val d'Orcia, Siena, Toscana, 53025, Italia
